User.title: User
User.description: Represents an authenticated user of the DocuExtract application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity (typically from an external authentication system like Firebase UID).

Document.title: Document
Document.description: Represents an uploaded image or document by a user for text extraction and analysis.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Document entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who uploaded this document. (Relationship: User 1:N Document)

uploadDate.description: Timestamp when the document was uploaded.

originalFilename.description: The original filename of the uploaded document.

fileUrl.description: URL to the stored original document file (e.g., in cloud storage).

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the uploaded file (e.g., 'image/jpeg', 'application/pdf').

extractedText.description: The full raw text extracted from the document using OCR/AI.

documentType.description: Categorization of the document for specific extraction logic (e.g., 'IDENTITY_PROOF', 'BILL', 'MEDICAL_REPORT', 'GENERAL').

processingStatus.description: The current processing status of the document (e.g., 'UPLOADED', 'TEXT_EXTRACTED', 'DETAILS_EXTRACTED', 'FAILED').

Person.title: Person
Person.description: Represents an individual whose personal details have been extracted from one or more documents.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Person entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this Person record. (Relationship: User 1:N Person)

fullName.description: The full name of the person.

email.description: The person's email address, if extracted.

phone.description: The person's phone number, if extracted.

IdentityDetail.title: IdentityDetail
IdentityDetail.description: Stores structured information extracted specifically from identity proof documents.

id.description: Unique identifier for the IdentityDetail entity.

documentId.description: Reference to the Document from which this identity information was extracted. (Relationship: Document 1:1 IdentityDetail)

personId.description: Reference to the Person entity this identity detail belongs to. (Relationship: Person 1:N IdentityDetail)

idNumber.description: The unique identification number from the document.

issueDate.description: The date the identity document was issued.

expiryDate.description: The expiration date of the identity document.

issuingAuthority.description: The authority that issued the identity document.

nationality.description: The nationality indicated on the identity document.

BillDetail.title: BillDetail
BillDetail.description: Stores structured information extracted specifically from billing documents.

id.description: Unique identifier for the BillDetail entity.

documentId.description: Reference to the Document from which this billing information was extracted. (Relationship: Document 1:1 BillDetail)

vendorName.description: The name of the vendor or service provider on the bill.

totalAmount.description: The total amount of the bill.

invoiceNumber.description: The invoice number, if present on the bill.

BillLineItem.title: BillLineItem
BillLineItem.description: Represents an individual line item from a billing document.

id.description: Unique identifier for the BillLineItem entity.

billId.description: Reference to the BillDetail this line item belongs to. (Relationship: BillDetail 1:N BillLineItem)

description.description: Description of the item or service.

quantity.description: The quantity of the item or service.

unitPrice.description: The unit price of the item or service.

lineTotal.description: The total amount for this specific line item (quantity * unitPrice).

MedicalReportDetail.title: MedicalReportDetail
MedicalReportDetail.description: Stores structured information extracted specifically from medical reports.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MedicalReportDetail entity.

documentId.description: Reference to the Document from which this medical report information was extracted. (Relationship: Document 1:1 MedicalReportDetail)

patientId.description: Reference to the Person entity representing the patient. (Relationship: Person 1:N MedicalReportDetail)

reportDate.description: The date the medical report was issued.

hospitalName.description: The name of the hospital or clinic where the report was generated.

doctorName.description: The name of the doctor who prepared or reviewed the report.

diagnosis.description: The primary diagnosis from the medical report.

diseaseDetails.description: Detailed description of the disease or condition.

findings.description: Summary of medical findings and observations.

definition.description: Stores user profile information. The `userId` wildcard corresponds to the authenticated Firebase UID (`request.auth.uid`). Documents in this collection include an 'id' field that matches the `userId` for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, matching their Firebase Authentication UID.

definition.description: Stores uploaded images or documents for a specific user. Includes a denormalized 'userId' field matching the path's `userId` for authorization independence. This collection is the source for all extracted details.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this document.

params.name: documentId
params.description: The unique identifier for the specific document.

definition.description: Stores aggregated personal details extracted from documents for a specific user. Includes a denormalized 'userId' field matching the path's `userId` for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this person record.

params.name: personId
params.description: The unique identifier for the specific person record.

definition.description: Stores structured identity information extracted from a specific document. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence, 'documentId' (from path), and 'personId' to link to the corresponding Person entity.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this identity detail.

params.name: documentId
params.description: The unique identifier of the document from which this identity detail was extracted.

params.name: identityDetailId
params.description: The unique identifier for the specific identity detail record.

definition.description: Stores structured billing information extracted from a specific document. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence and 'documentId' (from path).

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this bill detail.

params.name: documentId
params.description: The unique identifier of the document from which this bill detail was extracted.

params.name: billDetailId
params.description: The unique identifier for the specific bill detail record.

definition.description: Stores individual line items for a specific bill. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence and 'billId' to link to the parent BillDetail.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this bill line item.

params.name: documentId
params.description: The unique identifier of the document associated with this bill line item.

params.name: billDetailId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent bill detail.

params.name: lineItemId
params.description: The unique identifier for the specific bill line item.

definition.description: Stores structured medical report information extracted from a specific document. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence, 'documentId' (from path), and 'patientId' to link to the corresponding Person entity.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this medical report detail.

params.name: documentId
params.description: The unique identifier of the document from which this medical report detail was extracted.

params.name: medicalReportDetailId
params.description: The unique identifier for the specific medical report detail record.

firestore.reasoning:
The current `FirebaseError: Missing or insufficient permissions` for a `list` operation on `/pending_verifications` for a logged-in user indicates a direct violation of the 'Rules are not Filters' (QAPs) principle. A top-level collection like `/pending_verifications` with potential mixed ownership or requiring specific roles (e.g., admin) cannot be listed by a regular user without complex and inefficient rules that attempt to filter documents, which is insecure and leads to such permission errors. 

Our design eliminates the problematic `/pending_verifications` collection for standard user access. Instead, we leverage the existing `processingStatus` field within the `Document` entity. Users will query their own documents, optionally filtering by `processingStatus` (e.g., 'PENDING_VERIFICATION') within their dedicated `/users/{userId}/documents` subcollection. If an administrative 'pending verification' queue is truly needed, it should be a separate, strictly access-controlled collection (e.g., `/admin_tasks/document_verifications`) accessible only to users with an 'admin' role, whose presence is verified via a dedicated `/roles_admin/{uid}` collection.

This structure strongly adheres to Authorization Independence and QAPs through these strategies:

1.  **Authorization Independence via Denormalization:** Every single document representing user-owned data (User, Document, Person, IdentityDetail, BillDetail, BillLineItem, MedicalReportDetail) will explicitly contain a `userId` field. This `userId` field will always match the `request.auth.uid` of the document's owner. This crucial denormalization ensures that security rules can perform direct `request.auth.uid == resource.data.userId` checks for any read/write operation without needing to perform `get()` calls on parent documents or related entities. This makes rules atomic, highly performant, and significantly easier to debug.

2.  **QAPs (Rules are not Filters) through Structural Segregation and Path-Based Ownership:**
    *   All user-specific data is strictly segregated into subcollections under a user's unique path, `/users/{userId}/...`. This automatically scopes `list` operations to the current authenticated user's data. For instance, a `list` on `/users/{userId}/documents` inherently returns only documents owned by `{userId}`. The security rules will simply verify `request.auth.uid == userId` (the wildcard in the path), ensuring no implicit filtering is attempted by the rules.
    *   By managing document processing states (like 'PENDING_VERIFICATION') directly within the user's `Document` collection via the `processingStatus` field, client-side queries can efficiently filter for specific statuses (`.where('processingStatus', '==', 'PENDING_VERIFICATION')`) without violating QAPs, as the primary authorization check is already handled by the path and the denormalized `userId`.

This design ensures that authorization logic is clear, robust, and performs optimally, avoiding the common pitfalls of `get()` dependencies and rules attempting to filter results for `list` operations.
